ToggleSwitch

A toggle switch component for binary on/off states with support for multiple sizes, disabled state, and keyboard accessibility.

ToggleSwitch

Stable

A toggle switch component for binary on/off states. Supports three sizes (sm, md, lg), disabled state, keyboard navigation (Enter/Space), and full accessibility via role="switch" and aria-checked.

View Source → View Storybook →

Live Demo

Settings

Dark Mode
Notifications
Auto-save
Disabled

Toggle switches for binary settings with on, off, and disabled states.

Sizes

Small (sm)

Compact size for dense layouts. 32x16px.

Medium (md)

Default size for standard forms. 40x20px.

Large (lg)

Prominent size for settings panels. 48x24px.

Props

Prop Type Default Description
checked boolean - Whether the toggle is checked/on
onChange (checked: boolean) => void - Callback fired when the toggle state changes
id string - Unique id for the toggle element
disabled boolean false Whether the toggle is disabled
size "sm" | "md" | "lg" "md" Size of the toggle
className string - Optional class name override

Usage

Basic Toggle

import { ToggleSwitch } from '@storyhouse/components';

export function DarkModeToggle() {
  const [enabled, setEnabled] = useState(false);
  
  return (
    <ToggleSwitch
      checked={enabled}
      onChange={setEnabled}
      size="md"
    />
  );
}

With Label

import { ToggleSwitch } from '@storyhouse/components';

export function SettingsToggle() {
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState(true);
  
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
      <ToggleSwitch
        checked={notifications}
        onChange={setNotifications}
        id="notifications"
      />
      <label htmlFor="notifications" className="text-sm font-medium">
        Enable Notifications
      </label>
    </div>
  );
}

Edge Cases & Accessibility

  • Keyboard navigation — Toggle is focusable via Tab and activates on Enter/Space.
  • Screen readers — Uses role="switch" and aria-checked for accessibility.
  • Disabled state — Reduces opacity and prevents interaction.
  • Smooth animation — Thumb slides with a 200ms ease-in-out transition.
  • Focus ring — Orange focus ring with offset for keyboard users.
ToggleSwitch Component
